TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Fafokod, title = Fafokod, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fafokod} }

S.FORM: alang Fafokod ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Hikasiki go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 454 buwan, 1,127 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 70% kyan ku 784 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 30% kyan ku 343 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 66%, Paywan 1%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Fafokod hya' ga Alapawan. tay mkyahu' na Fafokod hya' ga Kalifangar. tay 'zil na Fafokod hya' ga Ma'olaway. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. khu skwan biru maki 1 khu skwan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Fafokod ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Hikasiki go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 454 buwan, 1,127 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 70% kyan ku 784 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 30% kyan ku 343 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 66%, Paywan 1%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Fafokod hya' ga Alapawan. tay mkyahu' na Fafokod hya' ga Kalifangar. tay 'zil na Fafokod hya' ga Ma'olaway. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. khu skwan biru maki 1 khu skwan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *a*oko* ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ħikas~ɕiki ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, pajwan *%, pujuma *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na *a*oko* ħjaʔ ɣa alapawan. taj mkjaħuʔ na *a*oko* ħjaʔ ɣa kali*aŋar. taj ʔzil na *a*oko* ħjaʔ ɣa maʔolawaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. kħu s~ɕkwan βiru maki * kħu s~ɕkwan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
